description.value:
Frequency once per day

Your performances, vocal or otherwise, can tap into the same riotous primal energy as that of the First World, warping reality to the whimsy of your soul's emotional spectrum. Roll [[/r 1d20 #Song of Whimsy]] and consult the table below for your result. If the result's emotion doesn't match your current soulfeel, attune your soulfeel to that emotion. If the effect requires a saving throw, use the higher of your class DC or spell DC.

d20EmotionEffect
1–3FuryAll enemies within 30 feet must attempt a Will save. If they fail, they become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Confused] for 3 rounds (or 1 minute on a critical failure), and their latent anger causes them to deal an additional @Damage[3d4[persistent,bleed]] damage with all Strikes against allies.
4–6JoyYou and all allies within 30 feet reduce your frightened conditions by 1, end any persistent mental damage, and gain 25 temporary Hit Points that last until the end of your next turn.
7–9SorrowAll enemies within 30 feet become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Suppressed] until the end of your next turn and must attempt a Will save. If they fail, they become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Slowed]{Slowed 1} for 3 rounds (or 1 minute on a critical failure).
10–12WonderAll enemies within 30 feet become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Dazzled] until the end of your next turn and must attempt a Will save. On a failure, they become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2} for 3 rounds (or 1 minute on a critical failure).
13+Current soulfeelSelect the effect that corresponds to your current soulfeel attunement.
